targets.query:
SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, SUM(metric_value) AS value 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'api_requests_total' 
AND (tags->>'endpoint' LIKE '%/api/search%' OR tags->>'endpoint' LIKE '%/api/discovery%') 
AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, 
  (SUM(CASE WHEN tags->>'status' LIKE '5%' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(metric_value)) AS error_percentage 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'api_requests_total' 
AND (tags->>'endpoint' LIKE '%/api/search%' OR tags->>'endpoint' LIKE '%/api/discovery%') 
AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, 
  AVG(metric_value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name = 'api_request_duration' AND (tags->>'endpoint' LIKE '%/api/search%' OR tags->>'endpoint' LIKE '%/api/discovery%')) AS p95_latency 
FROM metrics 
WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC; 
-- NOTE: The above AVG is a placeholder. True P95 over time windows needs more complex SQL or Grafana features/transformations.

panels.title: Search Cache Hit Rate (%)

targets.query:
SELECT metric_timestamp AS time, 
  (SUM(CASE WHEN tags->>'status' = 'hit' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(metric_value)) AS value 
FROM metrics 
WHERE metric_name = 'cache_access_total' AND tags->>'cache_type' = 'search_results' 
  AND $__timeFilter(metric_timestamp) 
GROUP BY time 
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.description: Cache Hit Rate for search results (discovery services).
